title: pelargonium vaudricourtii
intro: Pelargonium vaudricourtii, also known as Vaud's Geranium or Mountain Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of rosmarinic acid, which has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium vaudricourtii include reducing symptoms of colds and flu, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems, such as diarrhea and nausea. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are typically infused in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
